channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [MITSU] Mitsu Chem Plast Approves ₹0.20 Dividend
item.description:
Mitsu Chem Plast Ltd's board has approved a final dividend of ₹0.20 per equity share with a face value of ₹10 each for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. This is subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming Annual General Meeting. The decision was made during a board meeting held on May 02, 2026, which commenced at 3:30 p.m. and concluded at 6:30 p.m.

  • Final dividend of ₹0.20 per share approved for FY26.
  • Dividend is subject to shareholder approval at the AGM.
  • Board meeting held on May 02, 2026, approved the dividend.
  • Audited financial results for FY26 were also approved.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Mitsu Chem Plast Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [NETWEB] Netweb Technologies Recommends ₹3 Dividend Per Share
item.description:
Netweb Technologies India Ltd's Board of Directors has recommended a final dividend of ₹3.00 per equity share (150% of face value of ₹2), subject to shareholder approval at the Annual General Meeting. This decision reflects the company's strong financial performance and commitment to rewarding shareholders while maintaining a prudent balance sheet. The dividend will be paid within 30 days of declaration at the AGM. The Board also approved the appointment of M/s. Sankalp & Associates as the Internal Auditors for FY 2025-26 and formally recognized two employees as Senior Management Personnel.

  • Netweb Technologies recommends a final dividend of ₹3.00 per share.
  • Dividend payout is subject to shareholder approval at the AGM.
  • Sankalp & Associates appointed as Internal Auditors for FY 2025-26.
  • Two employees formally recognized as Senior Management Personnel.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Netweb Technologies India Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [NETWEB] Netweb Technologies: FY26 Revenue ₹21,835.6 Million, PAT Margin 9.3%
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Netweb Technologies India Ltd has announced its audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026. The company reported revenue from operations of ₹21,835.6 million with a PAT margin of 9.3%. Netweb is an Indian origin OEM focused on High-end Computing Solutions (HCS). Key financials include an Op EBITDA Margin of 13.0%, ROE of 32.9%, and ROCE of 37.5%. The company is benefiting from the 'Make in India' initiative and the surge in demand for AI infrastructure.

  • Netweb Technologies reports revenue from operations of ₹21,835.6 million for FY26.
  • The company's PAT margin stands at 9.3% for the fiscal year 2026.
  • Netweb is recognized as a leading Indian OEM in High-end Computing Solutions.
  • The company is compliant with the Government of India's 'Make in India' initiative.
  • Netweb is an OEM partner with NVIDIA for Gen AI GPU Systems & Stack.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Netweb Technologies India Ltd | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [JARO] Jaro Institute Board Meeting Scheduled for May 7, 2026
item.description:
Jaro Institute of Technology Management and Research Ltd has announced a Board of Directors meeting scheduled for May 7, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window closure period will end 48 hours after the results are made public on May 9, 2026.

  • Board meeting to approve audited financial results for FY26.
  • Meeting scheduled for May 7, 2026.
  • Trading window closure ends 48 hours after results are public on May 9, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Jaro Institute of Technology Management and Research Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [LGBBROSLTD] LGB declares ₹22/share dividend for FY26
item.description:
LG Balakrishnan & Bros Ltd's board approved audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter/year ended March 31, 2026. They recommended a dividend of ₹22 per share (220% of face value) for FY26, subject to shareholder approval at the AGM. The dividend will be paid to members on record as of August 19, 2026, with payment on or before September 18, 2026. The board also approved the continuation of Sri.S.Sivakumar as a Non-Executive Non-Independent Director and re-appointed Dr G L Sankaran as Cost Auditor and Sri.G.Jawaharlal and Mjs.Lathi & Tapdiya as Internal Auditors.

  • LGB recommends a dividend of ₹22 per share for FY26.
  • Record date for dividend is August 19, 2026; payment by September 18, 2026.
  • Sri.S.Sivakumar's directorship continuation approved, subject to shareholder approval.
  • Dr G L Sankaran re-appointed as Cost Auditor for FY27.
  • Sri.G.Jawaharlal and Mjs.Lathi & Tapdiya re-appointed as Internal Auditors for FY27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: L.G.BALAKRISHNAN & BROS.LTD. | Category: Dividend

item.title: [MITSU] Mitsu Chem Plast: FY26 Final Dividend of ₹0.20/Share
item.description:
Mitsu Chem Plast Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. They have recommended a final dividend of 2%, which is ₹0.20 per equity share on a face value of ₹10 each, subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming Annual General Meeting. The board meeting was held on May 02, 2026, commencing at 3:30 p.m. and concluding at 6:30 p.m.

  • Audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, approved.
  • Final dividend of ₹0.20 per share (2% on face value of ₹10) recommended.
  • Auditor's report with an unmodified opinion enclosed with the results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Mitsu Chem Plast Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [NETWEB] Netweb Tech Recommends ₹3 Dividend for FY26
item.description:
Netweb Technologies India Ltd's board approved the audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, and recommended a final dividend of ₹3.00 per equity share (150% of face value of ₹2), subject to shareholder approval. The board also approved the appointment of M/s. Sankalp & Associates as the Internal Auditors for FY 2025-26 and formally recognized Mr. Mukul Kedia and Mr. Swastik Chakraborty as Senior Management Personnel.

  • Netweb Tech board recommends a final dividend of ₹3 per share.
  • Dividend payout is subject to shareholder approval at the AGM.
  • Sankalp & Associates appointed as Internal Auditors for FY26.
  • Mukul Kedia and Swastik Chakraborty recognized as Senior Management Personnel.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Netweb Technologies India Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [NETWEB] Netweb Tech Recommends ₹3 Dividend for FY26
item.description:
Netweb Technologies India Ltd's board approved the audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, and recommended a final dividend of ₹3.00 per equity share (150% of face value of ₹2), subject to shareholder approval. They also approved the appointment of M/s. Sankalp & Associates as Internal Auditors for FY26 and formally recognized Mr. Mukul Kedia and Mr. Swastik Chakraborty as Senior Management Personnel.

  • Netweb Tech board recommends a final dividend of ₹3 per share.
  • Sankalp & Associates appointed as Internal Auditors for FY26.
  • Mukul Kedia and Swastik Chakraborty recognized as Senior Management Personnel.
  • Audited financial results for FY26 approved with unmodified audit opinion.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Netweb Technologies India Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [LGBBROSLTD] LGB Re-appoints Dr. G L Sankaran as Cost Auditor for FY 2026-27
item.description:
LG Balakrishnan & Bros Ltd re-appointed Dr. G L Sankaran as Cost Auditor for the financial year 2026-27, based on the Audit Committee's recommendation. The board also approved the remuneration, subject to shareholder ratification at the upcoming Annual General Meeting. Additionally, Sri.G.Jawaharlal and Mjs.Lathi & Tapdiya were re-appointed as Internal Auditors for FY 2026-27.

  • Dr. G L Sankaran re-appointed as Cost Auditor for FY 2026-27.
  • Remuneration for Cost Auditor subject to shareholder approval.
  • Sri.G.Jawaharlal re-appointed as Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27.
  • Mjs.Lathi & Tapdiya re-appointed as Internal Auditors for FY 2026-27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: L.G.BALAKRISHNAN & BROS.LTD. | Category: Auditor

item.title: [LGBBROSLTD] LGB Re-appoints Internal Auditors for FY 2026-27
item.description:
LG Balakrishnan & Bros Ltd has re-appointed Sri.G.Jawaharlal and M/s.Lathi & Tapdiya as Internal Auditors for the financial year 2026-27. The decision was based on the recommendation of the Audit Committee and approved by the Board.

  • Sri.G.Jawaharlal re-appointed as Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27.
  • M/s.Lathi & Tapdiya re-appointed as Internal Auditors for FY 2026-27.
  • Re-appointment based on Audit Committee recommendation and Board approval.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: L.G.BALAKRISHNAN & BROS.LTD. | Category: Auditor
